check tyre pressure.

We picked up Tonic + arrived home at 4.30.

__August 22nd Friday.__
5.25. William, John, Charles, Simon + Eve left home. (Thomas at Greenbelt.) We didn't arrive at __Beauchamp__ until 7.0. because of a jam on the M5.

Peter played Haydn in his quartet. During "after cocoa" a boy played a tune on his violin by Messenet.

__Saturday 23rd.__
Charles has spent the summer terrified of wasps. William had a bad night because it's too short for him to sleep crosswise in the van. (His [illegible] new 7ft. bed arrived yesterday at home) We are visiting Gus King at 10.30. Wendy + the children are in Cornwall. Their house is lovely — half Tudor + half Victorian, moated, chickens. We picked blackberries.

Lunch in the field + Peter's concert went well. We went home after a cup of tea.

__Saturday September 6th.__
11.10. We motored to Malmesbury listening to Princess Diana's funeral on the radio. We had
